items.name: gold
items.description: Imperial coin, milled with a censor's mark. Everyone here has an opinion about what it can and cannot buy.

items.name: imperial cell key
items.description: A blunt iron key stamped with a ward number. It opens exactly one door and implicates whoever carries it.

items.name: hard bread ration
items.description: A brick of twice-baked ration bread. It keeps forever and tastes like it intends to.

items.name: water skin
items.description: A stitched hide skin, half full. Useful for drinking, dousing, or lending a stranger a reason to talk.

items.name: flask of lamp oil
items.description: A stoppered flask of amber lamp oil. Lights a room, or an argument, depending on the hand.

items.name: worn whetstone
items.description: A grooved grey stone that has straightened many edges and settled many nerves.

items.name: coil of tarred rope
items.description: Twelve arm-lengths of tarred rope. Good for climbing down, tying up, or hauling out.

items.name: brass tinderbox
items.description: Flint, steel, and char in a scratched brass case. The quiet grandfather of every larger fire.

items.name: healer's poultice
items.description: A linen wrap packed with bruised herbs. Closes a wound and buys an afternoon.

items.name: clouded mana draught
items.description: A vial of clouded liquid that tastes of copper and returns some of what casting takes.

items.name: roadworn travel cloak
items.description: A heavy grey cloak, patched at the hem. Turns weather and a little attention.

items.name: worn leather jerkin
items.description: Boiled leather scarred by other people's bad days. Modest, honest protection.

items.name: dented iron buckler
items.description: A small round shield, dented in a ring where blows have landed. It has clearly worked.

items.name: banded oak cudgel
items.description: A length of oak banded with iron. Not subtle, and not pretending to be.

items.name: leather sling
items.description: A worn sling and a pouch of river stones. Reach without a blade's reputation.

items.name: pilgrim's ashwood staff
items.description: A tall ash staff smoothed by many miles. Steadies a hand reaching for magic as readily as a body reaching for balance.

items.name: plain tin ward-charm
items.description: A stamped tin charm on a cord, sold at every crossroads. Wards a little; reassures a lot.

items.name: pouch of coarse salt
items.description: Grey trade salt in a cloth pouch. Preserves a meal, salts a line, closes a bargain.
